narrative:
Ava/Belle Valley (precinct in Noble County) has 290 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.8 percentage points.
